title: Donation
description: Donation schema from WildApricot Admin API

allOf.description: Link to contact who is assigned to the donation.
Link to payment assigned to the donation.

Comment.description: Internal note on donation. Visible to administrators only.

PublicComment.description: Comment on donation. Visible to both administrators and donors.

FieldValues.description: For each custom field you have added to your Wild Apricot database, the name of the field, its system code, and its value for this donation are returned. The system code is a unique field identifier that can be used instead of the field name to identify the field. As well, a number of system fields are returned.
